title: Trains of Ruun: Biomes O Plenty Addon
description: Adding Biomes O Plenty loads to Trains of Ruun
body:
Trains of Ruun: Community Addon requires Immersive Railroading and Trains of Ruun to properly operate

TRAINS OF RUUN: BIOMES O PLENTY ADDON

This pack adds Biomes O Plenty inspired loads to Trains of Ruun. All textures are made from scratch as to not redistribute base Biomes O Plenty textures. Discord

CONTENTS

**Short Gondolas** - Ash - Black Sand - Dried Sand - Flesh - Loamy Earth - Mud - Orange Sand - Sandy Dirt - Silty Dirt - White Sand **Tall Gondolas** - Ash - Black Sand - Dried Sand - Flesh - Loamy Earth - Mud - Orange Sand - Sandy Dirt - Silty Dirt - White Sand **Logs** - Cherry - Dead - Ebony - Ethereal - Eucalyptus - Fir - Hellbark - Jacaranda - Magic - Mahogany - Mangrove - Palm - Pine - Redwood - Sacred Oak - Stems - Umbran - Willow

NOTES

This pack is an addon to the base Trains of Ruun. It will not work without Trains of Ruun! This pack uses my own textures based on Biomes O Plenty. They are not an exact match due to BoP's terms of use. Usage and redistribution in any form is allowed, just please give credit and link back here in some form =) Discord Patreon Iron Horse Dev Group
